post.content:
I interviewed at Uber in March-April 2022 for their analytics & insights team on Rides. I’ll share my experience and resources below,

Overview:
- HR screen
- Takehome assessment
- Technical phone screen
- Onsite (4 interviews back to back)

Types of behavioral questions:
- Why Uber?
- When have you used data to solve a problem?
- Tell me about a time you disagreed with your manager or teammate?

Types of technical questions:
- What is the latest trip timestamp for each user who took at least one trip?
- For each user that has taken at least two trips with Uber, what is the time that elapsed between the first trip and second trip?

My suggested resources:
- [Uber SQL guide](http://www.faangtutors.com/uber) by FAANG Tutors
- Udemy analytics assessment
- LeetCode (obviously)
can you share some more insights on the take home assessment and coding interviews?\nthis is really vague
Please buddy can you share further info on the technical part and take home assignment. You can ping on insta here @bloggernitin
